title: jurinea deltoidea
intro: Jurinea deltoidea, also known as Prickly Lettuce or Russian Thistle, is a type of thistle plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds such as sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Jurinea deltoidea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as asthma and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
